name: Fresh Corn Spoonbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, whisk together milk and buttermilk until well combined.
3. Add cornmeal, fresh corn kernels, butter or margarine, sugar, and baking soda to the milk mixture. Stir until just combined; do not overmix.
4. Whisk egg yolks in a separate bowl. Slowly pour the yolk mixture into the corn mixture while stirring constantly.
5. Pour the batter into greased muffin tins or ramekins, filling each about 2/3 full.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from oven and let cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
